sections.paragraph:
Original: פּרה

Transliteration: pârâh

Phonetic: paw-raw'

BDB Definition:

  1. to bear fruit, be fruitful, branch off
    1. (Qal) to bear fruit, be fruitful
    2. (Hiphil)
      1. to cause to bear fruit
      2. to make fruitful
      3. to show fruitfulness, bear fruit

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1809

Part(s) of speech: Verb
